workflow_rules.description: Workflow planner source, schema, Make orchestration, CI fingerprint, or CLI/documentation surface changed; refresh the planner before finality verification.
Release evidence producers, schemas, or Make orchestration changed; rebuild the ordered release evidence converge chain before trusting operator summaries.
Report-contract tests, policy input, or schema samples changed; refresh schema samples and test-execution evidence, then close the generated artifact convergence loop.
Root external reports or their manifest changed; refresh report provenance before generated artifact convergence and release summaries.
Task observation inventory changed; resettle generated surfaces through the fixed-point writer before finality verification.
Canonical generated reports changed; use the focused resettle lane so finality is rewritten only after generated artifact convergence and fixed-point closeout.
Public-surface or CI workflow boundaries changed; run static/public policy checks in addition to the relevant evidence refresh.
